diagrams.title: UML Class Box Structure
diagrams.description: Standard three-section UML class box showing visibility and attribute/operation syntax
elements: Middle box: Attributes with format 'name: type = default'
Bottom box: Operations with format 'name(parameter: type): returnType'
diagrams.purpose: To understand the standard notation for representing classes in UML class diagrams

diagrams.title: Class Relationship Types
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of Association, Aggregation, Composition, and Generalization relationships
elements: Association: Simple line connecting two classes
Aggregation: Line with empty diamond on 'whole' side
Composition: Line with filled black diamond on 'whole' side
Generalization: Line with triangular arrowhead pointing to superclass
diagrams.purpose: To distinguish between different types of relationships and know when to use each

diagrams.title: Multiplicity Notation Examples
diagrams.description: Visual representation of multiplicity notations in UML class diagrams
diagrams.purpose: To correctly specify cardinalities in class relationships
